verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My boat of life sails on a troubled sea, Ever there's a wind in my sail; But I have a Friend, who watches over me, When the breeze turns into a gale.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know the Master of the wind, I know the Maker of the rain; He can calm the storms and make the sun to shine again, I know the Master of the wind.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes I soar like an eagle to the sky, Among the peaks my soul can be found; An unexpected storm may drive me from the height, It may bring me low, but it'll never bring me down.
